name: Vishal Ranjan
headline: Founder, market researcher, and vibe coder.
tagline: Building IMARC, Claight, and KAMRIT, and a small army of practical tools along the way.
bio: Vishal Ranjan is the founder of IMARC Services Private Limited, Claight Corporation, and KAMRIT Financial Services LLP. He works at the intersection of market intelligence, financial services, and software, and ships small tools that solve specific problems, from QR-coded business cards to email deliverability checks to research utilities. This is his personal home on the web: a single place that lists everything he is building and a way to reach him.
shortBio: Founder of IMARC Services, Claight Corporation, and KAMRIT Financial Services. Builds market-research products and indie tools.
alsoKnownAs: Vishal Ranjan, founder of Claight Corporation
Vishal Ranjan, founder of KAMRIT Financial Services
disambiguation: There are several public figures named Vishal Ranjan. This site is the official personal site of the Vishal Ranjan who founded IMARC Services Private Limited, Claight Corporation, and KAMRIT Financial Services LLP.
